name: skin-macos
title: macOS (Big Sur/Sonoma) skin
description: Modern macOS concept skin: vibrancy blur, hairline borders, traffic-light chrome, system blue. A CSS overlay scoped to [data-skin="macos"] over unmodified shadcn components.
docs: 1) @import "./skins/macos.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="macos" on <html>.
